positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric pattern featuring intertwining woodland animals silhouettes—a fox, deer, and bear—interspersed with stylized botanical elements like ferns and abstract moon phases. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, using a limited, autumnal color palette of burnt orange, deep moss green, slate grey, and creamy ochre. The style should be cohesive and vector-like, optimized for high contrast and clean printing on apparel. Flat graphic design aesthetic, clean linework, negative space utilization, repeat pattern potential.
negative: blur, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, writing, photorealistic, 3d render, complex shadows, gradients, messy, distracting
